regional_cost_note: Gisborne waterproofing contractors typically charge $900–$2,800 for bathroom waterproofing, $85–$190/m² for deck membranes, and $65–$140/m² for roof membranes. Gisborne rates are typically 10–15% below the national average; some specialist trades travel from Hawke's Bay. Always use a licensed waterproofer for wet areas — poor waterproofing is one of the most common and costly defects in NZ homes.
